zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Robinson於1489年出生在英國英格蘭米德萊可時，他的父親Sir James Henry Robinson20歲，母親Michele Smith20歲。他於大約1510年與Anne Agnes Savage在英國英格蘭米德萊可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年8月15日在英國英格蘭享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Robinson于1489年出生在英国英格兰米德萊可时，他的父亲Sir James Henry Robinson20岁，母亲Michele Smith20岁。他于大约1510年与Anne Agnes Savage在英国英格兰米德萊可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年8月15日在英国英格兰享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Robin , a pet form of Robert , + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
French: from a pet form of the personal name   Robin  .

West Indian (including Haiti) and Guyanese: most likely not (only) of English or French origin as in 1 above and 2 above, but also, if not mostly, from the related name of the famous Daniel Defoe's literary character Robinson Crusoe (from a novel first published in 1719).

variants.name: Robbinson
meanings: Altered form of English or French   Robinson  .

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Emile, Marcel, Achille, Armand, Arnaud, Camille, Julien, Michel, Normand.
French, Breton, Scottish, English, and German: from the personal name Robin, a pet form of Robert , composed of the short form Rob + the hypocoristic suffix -in.
Slovenian: topographic name derived from rob ‘edge, border’ (see Robar ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Robinson was born in 1489, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James Henry Robinson, was 20 and his mother, Michele Smith, was 20. He married Anne Agnes Savage about 1510, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 August 1543, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Robinson est né en 1489, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Henry Robinson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Michele Smith, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Anne Agnes Savage environ 1510, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 août 1543, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Robinson 1489 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Henry Robinson 20 und seine Mutter Michele Smith 20. Er hat um 1510 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Anne Agnes Savage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. August 1543 im Alter von 54 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Robinson è nato il nel 1489 nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir James Henry Robinson, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Michele Smith, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Anne Agnes Savage circa 1510, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 agosto 1543, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Robinsonが1489年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで生まれた時，父Sir James Henry Robinsonは20歳，母Michele Smithは20歳であった。約1510年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスでAnne Agnes Savageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年8月15日にイギリスイギリスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Robinson(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Henry Robinson(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Michele Smith(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 Anne Agnes Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 8월 15일 영국 잉글랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Robinson nasceu em 1489, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Henry Robinson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Michele Smith, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Agnes Savage aproximadamente 1510, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1543, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Robinson родился в 1489 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James Henry Robinson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Michele Smith, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Agnes Savage около 1510 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 августа 1543 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Robinson nació en 1489, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Henry Robinson, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Michele Smith, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Anne Agnes Savage aproximadamente 1510, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1543, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
